source.evidenceSummary: The official item record dates Beautiful Ohio to November 20, 1918, and lists Henry Burr among the contributors.

questions.prompt: Which vocal pair performed or worked on Smiles?
questions.explanation: Albert Campbell and Henry Burr appear among the contributors.

source.title: Smiles
source.evidenceSummary: The item record dates Smiles to July 26, 1918, and lists Albert Campbell and Henry Burr among the contributors.

questions.prompt: Which ensemble performed or worked on Moonlight Bay?
questions.explanation: The American Quartet appears with Edward Madden and Percy Wenrich.

source.title: Moonlight Bay
source.evidenceSummary: The official item record dates Moonlight Bay to December 15, 1911, and lists the American Quartet, Edward Madden, and Percy Wenrich.
